title: Most AI trading tools try to predict the market. I used it to eliminate bad trades instead
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Most AI tools in trading focus on prediction.

I tried that route.

Didn’t work for me.

Too much noise. Too many false signals.

So I flipped the idea.

Instead of asking:  
“Where will price go?”

I asked:  
“What trades should I NOT take?”

Looked at my past trades:

* weak structure
* no confirmation
* chasing moves

That’s where most losses came from.

So I built simple filters:

* no clean setup → no trade
* no confirmation → no trade

That alone made a difference.

Less trades. More consistency.

The annoying part is checking this manually every time.

So I coded a small tool that scans charts and filters setups based on these rules.

Nothing fancy. Just discipline, automated.

If you're working on similar ideas:  
[https://herculmarket.com](https://herculmarket.com/)
